settingsStadium_intro.message: The following settings are for the stadium.

settingsStadium_addOverallPrices.message: Add function 'Overall stadium prices'. Changing the overall price will change the entry prices of all blocks of the correspondent kind of game.

settingsStadium_addOffsetPrices.message: Add function 'Block offset prices'. The offset price of a block will be added to the overall stadium price of the correspondent kind of game.
